race.comment: Another race with a host of these having first try this area for new yard. CIFONELLI (5) is a former NSW galloper who has had two starts for the new barn and both have been good. Has stormed home at each, the latest finishing ninth but only a few lengths from the winner. Looks well placed here and hard to hold out again. COPPABELLA ROAD (9) has placed four of last five and long overdue. Speedy galloper who looks a leading player here. GOT GUMPTION (3) is a former Northern NSW galloper resuming for the new team. Goes well fresh and has the claim and inside gate. Anticipating a strong run. MELO MELO KAVA (7) was in strong form before a break and looks well placed here fresh. Placed only try this circuit and drawn for a wide run. BIGCAT (2) is a big watch. Talented galloper resuming for new yard and off a very long break. Has obviously had some issues, trialling a number of times last year and not racing. But fitter for two recent trials including a win and should run well.
